summary: Comprehensive testing of Phase 31 features: Cosmic Calendar, Certifications, Wellness Reports, Meditation History, and Uploads/Media Library. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). All 5 frontend pages working correctly with proper navigation integration.
seed_data_creation: Test meditation sessions created during testing (prefixed with TEST_), test audio file uploaded
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 31 features fully functional: Cosmic Calendar (4 cosmic systems), Certifications (user achievements), Wellness Reports (weekly/monthly with insights), Meditation History (log and view sessions), Uploads/Media Library (audio/video upload). All regression tests pass.

GET /api/cosmic-calendar/today.returns: date, energy_summary, numerology (personal_year/month/day), moon (phase, code, age, guidance), mayan (kin, day_sign, glyph, tone, galactic_signature), cardology (card, suit, value, color)

frontend_page.cosmic_cards: 4 cards - Numerology, Moon Phase, Mayan Tzolk'in, Daily Card
frontend_page.energy_summary: Dynamic summary based on all cosmic systems

GET /api/wellness-reports/weekly (auth).returns: period, start, end, summary (total_activities, mood_entries, dominant_mood, avg_intensity, mood_breakdown, current_streak), activities (journals, meditations, yoga_sessions, meals_logged, dreams_logged, reiki_sessions, acupressure_sessions, rituals_completed), insights

GET /api/wellness-reports/monthly (auth).returns: Same structure as weekly but for 30-day period

frontend_page.stats: Activities, Streak, Mood Avg, Moods Logged
frontend_page.insights: Dynamic insights based on activity level and mood

POST /api/meditation-history/log (auth).body: {type, duration_minutes, focus, intention, notes, mood_before, mood_after, depth_rating}

frontend_page.log_form: Type, Duration, Mood Before/After, Intention, Notes, Depth slider, Save button
frontend_page.session_list: Shows logged sessions with type, duration, date, intention, notes

GET /api/certifications/my (auth).returns: Array of certifications with id, class_name, completed_at

frontend_page.empty_state: Shows 'No certifications yet' message when empty
frontend_page.cert_cards: Shows certification cards with class name, certified badge, date, ID

POST /api/uploads/media (auth, multipart.validation: Rejects invalid file types (400), enforces 50MB limit (413)

GET /api/uploads/my (auth).returns: uploads array with id, title, description, media_type, filename, file_size, tags, created_at

frontend_page.upload_form: Title, Type (audio/video), Description, Tags, File input, Upload button
frontend_page.media_list: Shows uploaded files with play controls for audio, video player for video

pages_tested: /cosmic-calendar - 4 cosmic system cards, birth date inputs, energy summary
/certifications - Certification cards with class name, date, ID
/wellness-reports - Weekly/Monthly toggle, stats, activity breakdown, insights
/meditation-history - Stats, log form with all fields, session list
/media-library - Upload form with title, type, file input, submit button
frontend_tests_summary.navigation_verified: Calendar in primary nav, More dropdown has Reports, Certs, Med History, My Media
